package rulecoverage

func NegativeErrorCodeLiteralsDuplicatedAcrossHandlers() string {
    ruleID := "error_code_literals_duplicated_across_handlers"
    family := "architecture"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "Repeated string error codes without a centralized catalog."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
